mapper.select: SELECT g.gallery_seq ,g.title ,g.gallery_year ,g.description ,g.file_seq ,g.sort_seq ,g.use_yn ,g.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,cu.name AS rgst_user_name ,g.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,g.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,uu.name AS upt_user_name ,g.updated_at AS upt_date_time ,COALESCE(img.image_count, 0) AS image_count ,img.cover_file_dtl_seq ,img.cover_file_path FROM event.gallery g LEFT JOIN event.users cu ON cu.user_seq = g.created_by LEFT JOIN event.users uu ON uu.user_seq = g.updated_by LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS image_count ,( ARRAY_AGG(d.file_dtl_seq ORDER BY d.sort_seq ASC, d.file_dtl_seq ASC) )[1] AS cover_file_dtl_seq ,( ARRAY_AGG(d.file_path ORDER BY d.sort_seq ASC, d.file_dtl_seq ASC) )[1] AS cover_file_path FROM event.tb_file_dtl d WHERE d.file_seq = g.file_seq AND d.del_yn = 'N' AND LOWER(COALESCE(d.file_type, '')) IN ('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp') ) img ON TRUE WHERE g.gallery_seq = #{gallerySeq} AND g.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT d.file_dtl_seq ,d.file_seq ,d.file_nm ,d.file_path ,d.file_type ,d.sort_seq FROM event.tb_file_dtl d WHERE d.file_seq = #{fileSeq} AND d.del_yn = 'N' AND LOWER(COALESCE(d.file_type, '')) IN ('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp') ORDER BY d.sort_seq ASC, d.file_dtl_seq ASC
